title: angelonia perennis
intro: Angelonia perennis, also known as Blue Sage, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its blue-purple flowers and distinctive, fragrant foliage. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an expectorant and anti-inflammatory, helping to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Angelonia perennis include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Blue Sage can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
